basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 62 Tutor / Demonstrator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) has officially announced the Tutor / Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 with 62 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. DEANAC-25016/1/2024-DEAN ACADEMIC/5556 at the official website. Candidates who meet the maximum age limit of 30 years and hold qualifications such as MBBS, M.Sc. in concerned Medical Speciality, MD, or PhD in the relevant discipline can now submit their online applications from 22-05-2026 to 05-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD (OPH): 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, M.Sc. in concerned Medical Speciality from MCI/NMC recognised Institute, MD/PhD in respective Medical Speciality
qualification.details: Anatomy, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Pharmacology, Physiology: MBBS / M.Sc. in concerned Medical Speciality from MCI/ NMC recognised Institute. Desirable: MD / PhD in respective Medical Speciality. Forensic Medicine & Toxicology (MBBS): MBBS. Desirable: MD in FMT / MD in pathology & Lab Medicine. (Non-Medical candidates will not be considered.) Forensic Medicine & Toxicology (M.Sc Forensic Science): M.Sc in Forensic Science. Pathology & Lab. Medicine: MBBS. Desirable: MD in FMT / MD in pathology & Lab Medicine. (Non-Medical candidates will not be considered.)

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-10 in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC plus usual allowances and NPA (for Medical candidates)
salary_details.details: Salary: Level-10 in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC plus usual allowances and NPA (for Medical candidates).

selection_process: Document Screening by Screening Committee Written Examination (only if applicants more than 3 times the number of posts) Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bhubaneswar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Tutor/Demonstrator posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Tutor/Demonstrator posts at AIIMS Bhubaneswar is 05 June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Tutor/Demonstrator at AIIMS Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: There are a total of 62 vacancies for the Tutor/Demonstrator positions across various departments at AIIMS Bhubaneswar. The detailed breakdown is available in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by department. Generally, it includes MBBS or M.Sc. in the concerned Medical Speciality from an MCI/NMC recognized Institute. Some posts also require MD/PhD.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to these posts is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, OBC, and PwBD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1770 for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 1416 for SC/ST candidates. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Tutor/Demonstrator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves document screening, followed by a written examination (if the number of applicants exceeds three times the number of posts), and finally a personal interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for these Tutor/Demonstrator positions at AIIMS Bhubaneswar is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary as per Level-10 in the Pay Matrix as per the 7th CPC, along with usual allowances and Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) for medical candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Odisha apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Odisha. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.
